# Che Argentina Travel Article Corpus

This dataset contains 88 long-form English article records from Che Argentina Travel.

Canonical dataset:
https://huggingface.co/datasets/samuelandaudreymedianetwork/che-argentina-travel-article-corpus

Zenodo DOI:
https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18665586

Source website:
https://cheargentinatravel.com

Recommended files:
- che-argentina-travel.jsonl
- che-argentina-travel.csv
- DATA_DICTIONARY.md
- SCHEMA.json
- CITATION.cff

Records:
- 88 article records

License:
CC BY-NC 4.0

Contact:
nomadicsamuel@gmail.com
